basic_details.job_title: CBI Forensic Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) Forensic Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://cbi.gov.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CBI Forensic Advisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years as on 01 July 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Forensic Science or related discipline, Minimum 2 years experience in forensic advice and support
qualification.details: A Master's Degree in Forensic Science from a recognized university; or A Master's Degree in any branch of Science, Engineering, Technology, Medicine, Law, Criminology, or related discipline from a recognized university, with specialized qualifications, training or substantial experience in forensic sciences. Minimum of 2 years' Experience in providing expert forensic advice and support in criminal investigations, prosecutions, or judicial proceedings. Hands-on experience in forensic technology, tools & techniques, data analysis, fraud detection, audio-video analysis, cyber security.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CBI Forensic Advisor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.central_bureau_of_investigation_cbi: Master's Degree in Forensic Science or related discipline, Minimum 2 years experience in forensic advice and support

content_sections.heading: CBI Forensic Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CBI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CBI Forensic Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A Master's Degree in Forensic Science from a recognized university; or A Master's Degree in any branch of Science, Engineering, Technology, Medicine, Law, Criminology, or related discipline from a recognized university, with specialized qualifications, training or substantial experience in forensic sciences. Minimum of 2 years' Experience in providing expert forensic advice and support in criminal investigations, prosecutions, or judicial proceedings. Hands-on experience in forensic technology, tools & techniques, data analysis, fraud detection, audio-video analysis, cyber security.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 45 years as on 01 July 2026.

rows.event: Cut-off date for age and experience

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CBI Forensic Advisor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CBI Forensic Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CBI Forensic Advisor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application email for the CBI Forensic Advisor post is 15 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Forensic Advisor post in CBI?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Forensic Advisor post in the Central Bureau of Investigation recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for CBI Forensic Advisor Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the CBI Forensic Advisor post is via Email. Candidates need to send their complete application to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Forensic Advisor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Forensic Advisor post is 45 years as of 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Forensic Advisor in CBI?
faq.answer: The selected Forensic Advisor will receive a salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for the Forensic Advisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's Degree in Forensic Science or a related discipline, along with a minimum of 2 years of experience in forensic advice and support.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CBI Forensic Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CBI Forensic Advisor recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Forensic Advisor position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Forensic Advisor post involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview. Candidates will be informed about the interview details.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the Forensic Advisor be posted?
faq.answer: The posting location for the Forensic Advisor will be New Delhi, Delhi, with pincode 110003, as per the notification details.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Forensic Advisor post?
faq.answer: The Forensic Advisor position at CBI is a Contract-based job. The duration of the contract will be specified in the official notification.
